pages.text: The $(item)Transmutation Crucible$() is the center of Chaos Alchemy. Craft one from a Transmutation Crystal, two gold ingots, and a cauldron, then place it and fill it with water.
Every reaction consumes a small amount of water. A bucket fills the crucible for many reactions.

pages.title: Alchemical Decomposition
pages.text: An Eye of Ender serves as the catalyst. It observes a Transmutation Crystal and reveals the essence hidden inside. The catalyst is not consumed.

pages.title: First Reaction
pages.text: $(li)Drop an Eye of Ender into the crucible.$(li)Drop in a Transmutation Crystal.$(li)Wait for the automatic reaction.$(li)Right-click the crucible to take the essence metal.$(br2)This is your only initial source of essence metals.

pages.title: Twelve Essence Metals
pages.text: Decomposition normally yields one of eleven common essences. $(item)Pandemonium$() appears only one time in a hundred, yet is vital to advanced alchemy. Decompose crystals in batches to build a varied reserve.
